violations.text: Bottle water was observed stored on the floor in the sales area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The chest freezers have an accumulation of ice debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Various pastry items and soups packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The door to the left-side toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
